name: story-continuity-guard
description: A local-first Codex plugin for story continuity and AI-agent configuration security audits.

interface.shortDescription: Audit story continuity and agent configuration risks.
interface.longDescription: A local-first workflow for AI-assisted stories and agent projects. It checks revision metadata, claim labels, source references, immutable history, and risky patterns in AGENTS.md, SKILL.md, plugin manifests, and MCP configuration.
interface.defaultPrompt: Audit this story project for revision and continuity risks without modifying its source files.
